details.n: Don't Toy with Me, Miss Nagatoro

ratings.en: Senpai is a bit... / Senpai, don't you ever get angry?
You Got Your Wish, Senpai!!/'Sup, Senpai?!
Let's Play Again, Senpai/Over Here, Senpai
Senpai, You've Gone Beet Red/Senpai needs a little more...
You're too gullible, Senpai~<3/Senpai! Let's Go to the Beach!!
